name: rentit-apk
description: Android APK wrapper for RentIT using Capacitor

scripts.sync: npm run build:web && npm run use:admin && npm run prepare:assets && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:admin: npm run build:web && npm run use:admin && npm run prepare:assets && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:technician: npm run build:web && npm run use:technician && npm run prepare:assets && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run sync:admin && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:admin: npm run sync:admin && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:technician: npm run sync:technician && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
